name: Skillet Corn and Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat margarine over medium-high heat. Cook chicken in the hot margarine for 10 minutes or until browned.
2. Remove the chicken and set aside. Use tongs to spoon off any excess fat from the skillet.
3. In the same skillet, add the remaining ingredients (corn soup, milk, broccoli, cheese, and pepper). Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Return the cooked chicken to the skillet.
5. Cover and cook over low heat for 10 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink and the broccoli is tender-crisp, stirring occasionally.
6. Garnish with tomato wedges and fresh thyme if desired. Campbell's New Golden Corn Soup
